children.heading: Availability
children.label: 1 Availability
children.text: For each of the 2008 through 2012 crops of each loan commodity, the Secretary shall make available to producers on a farm nonrecourse marketing assistance loans for loan commodities produced on the farm.

children.heading: Terms and conditions
children.label: 2 Terms and conditions
children.text: The marketing assistance loans shall be made under terms and conditions that are prescribed by the Secretary and at the loan rate established under for the loan commodity.section 8732 of this title

children.heading: Eligible production
children.label: b Eligible production
children.text: The producers on a farm shall be eligible for a marketing assistance loan under subsection (a) for any quantity of a loan commodity produced on the farm.

children.heading: Compliance with conservation and wetlands requirements
children.label: c Compliance with conservation and wetlands requirements
children.text: As a condition of the receipt of a marketing assistance loan under subsection (a), the producer shall comply with applicable conservation requirements under subtitle B of title XII of the Food Security Act of 1985 ( et seq.) and applicable wetland protection requirements under subtitle C of title XII of that Act ( et seq.) during the term of the loan.16 U.S.C. 381116 U.S.C. 3821
